channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged thames water cover., 11th April
item.description:
Small round thames water cover is damaged outside house number 411
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 417-447, Erith Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paper bin not been emptied in 2 weeks, 11th April
item.description:
Communal Paper bin not been emptied in 2 weeks, people are now fly tipping around the bins
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frobisher Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A influx of political flyposting on walls, lampposts, Bus stop shelters all along Brixton main road SW9 and I am certain in other areas to., 11th April
item.description:
There has been an Influx of Political flyposting placed on walls, Bus Stop shelters, lamp posts all along Brixton main road SW9. I am most certain other areas have been targeted to. The flyers read Shake it up Community Assembles Vote Eduardo Salgado May 7th Council Elections at International House, 6 Canterbury Crescent, SW9 7QD. Small print on bottom reads promoted by Shake it up on behalf of Eduardo Salgado 108 Dahlberg road SW2 1AW Printed by Shake it up, 51 Lilford Road SE5 9HY. There is a bar code on the bottom left with telephone contact number. Please can something be done to address this issue surely Flyposting carries a hefty fine, contact details have been left on the flyer. If Lambeth council cleaning team can address this matter it be very much appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon in the road on Powis Street, near Woolwich Market, 11th April
item.description:
There is a dead pigeon in the road directly outside the front entrance of the Woolwich Indoor Market building (125 Powis Street). The carcass is in the carriageway, approximately 1-2 metres from the kerb. As this is a very busy pedestrian area near the market entrance, it is a hygiene hazard and needs to be cleared before the morning footfall. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powis Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime Bike, 11th April
item.description:
BIke no: DTE-NXQ Abandoned in Hardings Lane (again)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in a conservation area, 11th April
item.description:
Graffiti in a conservation area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Avenue, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bus lanes illuminated sign, 11th April
item.description:
Bulb blown, needs replacing, and the sign could do with a wash too,!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Place, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned since 2025, 11th April
item.description:
Vehicle not moved since October 2025.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lime Kiln Drive, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Antisocial behaviour on West ham match days stupid young girl rollerblading backwards into oncoming traffic hitting vehicle side. female girl was okay was laughing at the damage she caused to car, then skated of. Football matches are not managed properly or barriers put in place this is causing antisocial behavior and chaos on roads.., 11th April
item.description:
Uneducated stupid young teenagers skating backwards into oncoming vehicles. West ham football stadium need to manage surrounding roads on advent days. Advent poor managed. Metropolitan police nowhere to be seen on match day anti-social behavior.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Even more flytipping, 11th April
item.description:
Even more fly-tipping in front of 54. Luckily the elections are soon so we can vote out this council doing nothing for the comunity

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle seems to be abandoned or "hidden", 11th April
item.description:
This vehicle has no MOT valid. Expired 6th. April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London

item.title: Ruined pavement, 11th April

item.title: Fly tipping on Wayland Avenue by Hermitage Row, 11th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hermitage Row, Hackney, London

item.title: Union flag attached to a lamp post outside 21 Cavendish Avenue., 11th April
item.description:
This flag has been attached to the lamp post recently and I find the probable reasons that it has been put there offensive. Will the council please take it down, or am I allowed to take it down personally?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Cavendish Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Shalbourne square, 11th April
item.description:
There is constantly rubbish being dumped here including people’s old furniture that they clearly can’t be bothered taking to the tip. It’s horrible to enter the estate each day and see it. The car parking space here is never used which seems to contribute

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shalbourne Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small sofa and drawers, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipped sofa and other broken furniture.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree at the rear of 37 Houndsden Road N21 1LU, 11th April
item.description:
This tree has been dead for some considerable time and could if it falls cause damage to buildings nearby.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eversley Crescent, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 11th April
item.description:
Dead fox in the street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saratoga Road, Hackney, London
